g.aria-label: Connect to existing OPC UA servers or host your own with concise Python code.
Read, write, browse, subscribe and manage data in OPC UA capable servers with minimal boilerplate.
Built on open62541, one of the fastest OPC UA stacks, without trading performance for usibility
NodeIDs and DataTypes come from OPC UA specifications, no type guessing; IDE autocompletion and reliable typechecking, also in custom namspaces
Use it as a straightforward request/response API - or switch to asyncio for concurrent operations with the same interface
Encrypted connections and certificate-based authentication are fully supported out of the box
